theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
theme_and_archetype.description: A 'Quiet Luxury' aesthetic for an ERP and POS system. It combines minimalist beige neutral tones with deep, authoritative navy accents to create a premium, calm, and trustworthy environment for both backend staff and customer-facing POS.

hierarchy_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-navy-900
hierarchy_rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-navy-900

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (Quiet Luxury relies on breathing room). Mobile-first, prioritizing tablet (iPad) interfaces for the POS system.

buttons.primary: bg-navy-800 text-white hover:bg-navy-700 transition-colors rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-beige-200 text-navy-900 hover:bg-beige-300 transition-colors rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-navy-700 hover:bg-beige-200 transition-colors rounded-xl px-6 py-3
buttons.pos_action: h-16 text-lg rounded-2xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2

inputs.default: bg-white border border-beige-300 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-navy-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-navy-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-navy-500/50

tables.header: bg-beige-100 text-navy-800 font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider py-4 px-6 border-b border-beige-300

pos_specific.product_card: bg-white border border-beige-300 rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col items-center text-center cursor-pointer hover:border-navy-500 transition-all hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95
pos_specific.cart_sidebar: bg-white border-l border-beige-300 h-full flex flex-col

motion.page_transition: framer-motion initial opacity-0 translate-y-2 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons with 'regular' or 'light' weight for a premium, thin-line aesthetic.

logos.description: Minimalist elegant logo mark of a thread spool and needle in dark navy

backgrounds.description: Minimalist flat lay of premium beige linen fabric with deep navy thread spools
Clean, modern clothing store interior in beige and navy

products.description: Stack of folded shirts in earthy tones

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against beige backgrounds meets APCA standards. Navy (#131D33) on Beige (#F7F6F2) provides excellent contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format based on role (e.g., 'pos-checkout-button', 'login-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind with the provided custom color palette (Beige and Navy scales) in tailwind.config.js.
2. Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, and Shadcn UI (heavily customized with our colors and rounded-xl/2xl radii) for interactive components like tables, dropdowns, and modals.

3. Build a distinct mobile-first POS interface that takes full advantage of tablet viewports (iPad dimensions) featuring large touch targets (h-16 buttons), a split-screen bento layout (products on left, cart on right).
4. For data-dense ERP pages (Inventory, Accounting), utilize a crisp, card-based bento grid with muted backgrounds to reduce eye strain, emphasizing key metrics using the Navy color.
5. Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) to maintain the quiet luxury, thin-line aesthetic.
6. MUST integrate the media URLs from this JSON. DO NOT use placeholder images.
